Title: Add Event to User Calendar
Preconditions: User is authenticated and connected to the database.
Test Data: - Evento: eventoID="EVT001", titolo="Meeting", dataOraInizio="2023-10-01T10:00:00", dataOraFine="2023-10-01T11:00:00", descrizione="Discuss project", luogo="Office"
Test Steps:
1. Call CalendarioUtente.aggiungiEvento(evento).
2. CalendarioUtente connects to the database.
3. Database executes the query to add the event.
4. Database returns the result set.
5. CalendarioUtente receives the result set.
Expected Result: Event is successfully added to the user's calendar.

Title: Modify Event in User Calendar
Preconditions: User has an existing event in the calendar.
Test Data: - Evento: eventoID="EVT001", titolo="Meeting", dataOraInizio="2023-10-01T10:00:00", dataOraFine="2023-10-01T11:00:00", descrizione="Discuss project", luogo="Office"
Test Steps:
1. Call CalendarioUtente.modificaEvento(evento).
2. CalendarioUtente connects to the database.
3. Database executes the query to modify the event.
4. Database returns the result set.
5. CalendarioUtente receives the result set.
Expected Result: Event is successfully modified in the user's calendar.

Title: Delete Event from User Calendar
Preconditions: User has an existing event in the calendar.
Test Data: - Evento: eventoID="EVT001", titolo="Meeting", dataOraInizio="2023-10-01T10:00:00", dataOraFine="2023-10-01T11:00:00", descrizione="Discuss project", luogo="Office"
Test Steps:
1. Call CalendarioUtente.eliminaEvento(evento).
2. CalendarioUtente connects to the database.
3. Database executes the query to delete the event.
4. Database returns the result set.
5. CalendarioUtente receives the result set.
Expected Result: Event is successfully deleted from the user's calendar.

Title: View User Calendar
Preconditions: User has events in the calendar.
Test Steps:
1. Call CalendarioUtente.visualizzaCalendario().
2. CalendarioUtente connects to the database.
3. Database executes the query to retrieve all events.
4. Database returns the result set.
5. CalendarioUtente receives the result set.
Expected Result: All events are displayed in the user's calendar.

Title: Get Events Per Date
Preconditions: User has events in the calendar.
Test Steps:
1. Call CalendarioUtente.getEventiPerData(data).
2. CalendarioUtente connects to the database.
3. Database executes the query to retrieve events for the specified date.
4. Database returns the result set.
5. CalendarioUtente receives the result set.
Expected Result: Events for the specified date are returned.

Title: Connect to Database
Test Steps:
1. Call CalendarioUtente.connetti().
2. Database connection is established.
Expected Result: Connection to the database is successful.

Title: Disconnect from Database
Test Steps:
1. Call CalendarioUtente.disconnetti().
2. Database connection is closed.
Expected Result: Disconnection from the database is successful.

Title: User Login
Test Steps:
1. Call Applicazione.logIn().
2. Applicazione calls mAuth.getInstance().
3. mAuth calls Firebase Auth.getInstance().
4. mAuth calls Firebase Auth.getCurrentUser().
5. Firebase Auth returns the current user.
6. Applicazione logs in the user.
Expected Result: User is successfully logged in.

Title: Register and Log In New User
Test Steps:
1. Call Applicazione.registerAndLogin().
2. Applicazione calls mAuth.getInstance().
3. mAuth calls Firebase Auth.getInstance().
4. mAuth calls Firebase Auth.createUserWithEmailAndPassword().
5. Firebase Auth creates a new user.
6. Firebase Auth returns the current user.
7. Applicazione logs in the new user.
Expected Result: New user is registered and logged in successfully.

Title: Retrieve Signal List
Test Steps:
1. Call Applicazione.forward(getSegnalazioni()).
2. Applicazione forwards payload to Sistema di segnalazioni.
3. Sistema di segnalazioni forwards payload to Sistema di gestione dei dati.
4. Sistema di gestione dei dati queries the database for signals.
5. Database returns the signals as a payload.
6. Sistema di gestione dei dati displays the list of signals to Applicazione.
Expected Result: List of signals is retrieved and displayed.

Title: Request Train Variations
Test Steps:
1. Call Applicazione.train_variations(getVariationen).
2. Applicazione forwards the request to Sistema gestione variazioni.
3. Sistema gestione variazioni forwards the request to Sistema gestione dati.
4. Sistema gestione dati queries the database for train trends.
5. Database queries API Trenitalia for train information.
6. API Trenitalia returns the train information.
Expected Result: Train variations are requested and processed.

Title: Set Calendar
Test Steps:
1. Call Applicazione.setCalendarico(cal).
2. Applicazione forwards the request to Sistema gestione calendario.
3. Sistema gestione calendario forwards the request to Sistema di gestione dei dati.
4. Sistema di gestione dei dati queries the database for a new Calendarico.
5. Database returns the result.
6. Sistema di gestione dei dati forwards the outcome to Sistema gestione calendario.
7. Sistema gestione calendario displays the outcome to Applicazione.
Expected Result: Calendar is set successfully.

Title: Get Calendar
Test Steps:
1. Call Applicazione.getCalendario().
2. Applicazione forwards the request to Sistema gestione calendario.
3. Sistema gestione calendario queries the database for calendar data.
4. Database returns the calendar data.
5. Sistema di gestione dei dati forwards the data to Sistema gestione calendario.
6. Sistema gestione calendario displays the calendar data to Applicazione.
Expected Result: Calendar data is retrieved and displayed.

Title: Cancel Preferred Train
Test Steps:
1. Call Applicazione.forward(getTrains(calendario)).
2. Applicazione forwards the request to Sistema gestione calendario.
3. Sistema gestione calendario forwards the request to Sistema gestione dei dati.
4. Sistema gestione dei dati requests train information from API Trenitalia.
5. API Trenitalia queries the database for train information.
6. Database returns the train information.
7. API Trenitalia returns the outcome to Sistema gestione dei dati.
8. Sistema gestione dei dati forwards the outcome to Applicazione.
9. Applicazione displays the outcome to the user.
Expected Result: Train cancellation process is initiated and outcome is displayed.

Title: Delete Train from Calendar
Test Steps:
1. Call Applicazione.getTrains(calendario).
2. Applicazione forwards the request to Sistema gestione calendario.
3. Sistema gestione calendario forwards the request to Sistema di gestione dei dati.
4. Sistema di gestione dei dati queries the database to delete the train.
5. Database returns a status code.
6. API Trenitalia returns the response to Sistema di gestione dei dati.
7. Sistema di gestione dei dati forwards the outcome to Sistema gestione calendario.
8. Sistema gestione calendario displays the outcome to Applicazione.
Expected Result: Train is deleted from the calendar and outcome is displayed.

Title: Show Train Variation Notification
Test Steps:
1. Call Applicazione.getVariazioni().
2. Applicazione forwards the request to Sistema gestione variazioni.
3. Sistema gestione variazioni returns the train variations.
4. Applicazione forwards the train variations to Sistema di notifica.
5. Sistema di notifica shows the notification.
Expected Result: Train variation notification is shown to the user.

Title: Invalid Login Attempt
Preconditions: User account exists but invalid credentials provided.
Test Steps:
1. Call Applicazione.logIn().
2. Applicazione calls mAuth.getInstance().
3. mAuth calls Firebase Auth.getInstance().
4. mAuth calls Firebase Auth.getCurrentUser().
5. Firebase Auth returns null.
Expected Result: User login fails due to invalid credentials.

Title: User Registration Failure
Preconditions: User account does not exist but email is already registered.
Test Steps:
1. Call Applicazione.registerAndLogin().
2. Applicazione calls mAuth.getInstance().
3. mAuth calls Firebase Auth.getInstance().
4. mAuth calls Firebase Auth.createUserWithEmailAndPassword().
5. Firebase Auth returns an error indicating the email is already in use.
Expected Result: User registration fails due to email already being registered.

Title: No Signals Available
Preconditions: No signals available in the database.
Test Steps:
1. Call Applicazione.forward(getSegnalazioni()).
2. Applicazione forwards payload to Sistema di segnalazioni.
3. Sistema di segnalazioni forwards payload to Sistema di gestione dei dati.
4. Sistema di gestione dei dati queries the database for signals.
5. Database returns no signals.
6. Sistema di gestione dei dati displays an empty list to Applicazione.
Expected Result: An empty list is displayed indicating no signals are available.

Title: No Train Variations Available
Test Steps:
1. Call Applicazione.train_variations(getVariationen).
2. Applicazione forwards the request to Sistema gestione variazioni.
3. Sistema gestione variazioni forwards the request to Sistema gestione dati.
4. Sistema gestione dati queries the database for train trends.
5. Database queries API Trenitalia for train information.
6. API Trenitalia returns no train variations.
Expected Result: No train variations are available and the process completes without errors.
